name: velkross
description: Mergeability-first engineering guidance and reusable skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Codex changes scoped, reviewable, and merge-ready.
interface.longDescription: Velkross adds Mergeability-first Engineering guidance, lifecycle hooks, and reusable skills that help Codex keep code changes scoped, durable, typed, tested, and ready to review.
defaultPrompt: Use Velkross while implementing this change.
Review this diff with Velkross mergeability guidance.
Help me choose the smallest durable next step.
